title: Founder Recovery Foundations
shortSummary: Build stronger founder recovery foundations judgment so founder performance work becomes clearer, more repeatable, and easier to lead.
whyItMatters: Founder Recovery Foundations is a leverage point inside founder performance. It supports the broader goal of decision-making, time allocation, energy management, and resilience.
coreConcepts: Founder Recovery Foundations needs clear definitions before it can become a reliable operating system.
Good founder recovery foundations work depends on better signal, better sequencing, and cleaner ownership.
Founder Recovery Foundations should reduce rework and improve the quality of decisions across the business.
